hantu_tdf.example_query: SELECT fund_cd, fund_nm, nav FROM hantu_tdf WHERE std_dt = '2026-03-31' LIMIT 10

fred_indicators.example_query: SELECT indicator_cd, obs_dt, value FROM fred_indicators WHERE indicator_cd = 'GDP' ORDER BY obs_dt DESC LIMIT 5

common_queries.name: 최신 TDF 펀드 목록
common_queries.sql: SELECT DISTINCT fund_cd, fund_nm FROM hantu_tdf ORDER BY fund_nm

common_queries.name: 특정 펀드 수익률
common_queries.sql: SELECT std_dt, nav, return_1m FROM hantu_tdf WHERE fund_cd = '{fund_cd}' ORDER BY std_dt DESC LIMIT 30

common_queries.name: FRED 주요 지표
common_queries.sql: SELECT * FROM fred_indicators WHERE indicator_cd IN ('GDP', 'CPI', 'UNRATE') ORDER BY obs_dt DESC
